nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Patchy smoke. Partly cloudy, with a low around 80. Southeast wind around 2 mph.

nws.name: Tuesday
nws.detailedForecast: Patchy smoke before 8am, then patchy smoke and a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 8am and 10am, then patchy smoke and a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Partly sunny, with a high near 93. Heat index values as high as 106. Southeast wind 1 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

nws.name: Tuesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms before 3am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 79. Heat index values as high as 100. Southwest wind 1 to 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Wednesday
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms after 8am. Mostly sunny, with a high near 92. Heat index values as high as 102. Southwest wind 1 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

nws.name: Wednesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 2am. Partly cloudy, with a low around 79. South wind 1 to 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.
